report.summary: UX audit of 15 recently modified tool pages identified 5 missing Breadcrumbs, 75 missing OG images, and input validation gaps — fixed 5 Breadcrumb pages, created 5 OG images for high-priority pages, and updated metadata references.

sections.title: UX Audit Findings
items: 5 tool pages missing Breadcrumb navigation: market-recap, risk-score, sentiment-heatmap, token-radar, whale-tracker
75 tool pages missing custom OG images (using generic API fallback)
3+ pages missing loading/shimmer states for async data
4+ pages missing data freshness indicators (Updated X ago badges)
2 pages with input validation gaps: dca-calculator, bridge-aggregator
8+ pages missing keyboard accessibility handlers
5+ pages missing explicit FALLBACK_DATA constants

sections.title: UX Improvements Implemented
items: Added Breadcrumb navigation to tools/market-recap/page.tsx with proper wrapper layout
Added Breadcrumb navigation to tools/risk-score/page.tsx with proper wrapper layout
Added Breadcrumb navigation to tools/sentiment-heatmap/page.tsx with proper wrapper layout
Added Breadcrumb navigation to tools/token-radar/page.tsx with proper wrapper layout
Added Breadcrumb navigation to tools/whale-tracker/page.tsx with proper wrapper layout
All 5 pages now follow the standard server component layout pattern (maxWidth: 1200px, centered, padded)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: market-recap (1200x630) — bar chart visualization with gainers/losers
OG image: risk-score (1200x630) — semi-circular gauge with risk score zones
OG image: sentiment-heatmap (1200x630) — colored grid heatmap visualization
OG image: token-radar (1200x630) — radar/bullseye with token dots
OG image: whale-tracker (1200x630) — flow diagram with wallet nodes and transactions

sections.title: Metadata Updates
items: Updated market-recap openGraph and twitter image URLs to /og-market-recap.svg
Updated whale-tracker openGraph and twitter image URLs to /og-whale-tracker.svg
Updated risk-score openGraph and twitter image URLs from .png to .svg
Updated sentiment-heatmap openGraph and twitter image URLs from .png to .svg
Updated token-radar openGraph and twitter image URLs from .png to .svg

sections.title: Remaining Work (Next Cycle)
items: Create OG images for remaining 70 tool pages missing custom visuals
Add loading shimmer states to market-recap, dex-screener, bridge-aggregator
Add data freshness timestamps to altcoin-etf-tracker, bridge-aggregator, tokenized-stocks-tracker
Add input validation error messages to dca-calculator and bridge-aggregator
Add keyboard accessibility handlers across all interactive tool pages
